categories.name: Salary
categories.description: Regular employment income, wages, and paychecks from your job

categories.name: Other Income
categories.description: Investment returns, dividends, interest, cashbacks, bonuses, side income, freelance work, gifts received, refunds, and currency exchange gains

categories.name: Money Received
categories.description: Loan repayments received from others, reimbursements, and money borrowed that you're receiving back

categories.name: Housing
categories.description: Rent, home maintenance, repairs, household items like furniture, pillows, mops, containers, DIY supplies, and home decor

categories.name: Utilities
categories.description: Electricity, water, internet/WiFi, mobile recharges, data packs, telecom services, and waste management fees

categories.name: Food
categories.description: All food expenses including groceries for home cooking and dining out at restaurants, food delivery, cafes, and takeout

categories.name: Transportation
categories.description: Petrol/fuel, ride-sharing (Uber), public transport (train, metro, bus, auto), parking fees, and all travel-related transport costs

categories.name: Healthcare
categories.description: Health insurance premiums, medical expenses, medicines, doctor visits, pharmacy purchases, and hospital bills

categories.name: Personal Care
categories.description: Haircuts, salon services, grooming products, cosmetics, clothing, shoes, apparel, and fashion purchases

categories.name: Entertainment & Subscriptions
categories.description: Movies, cinema, streaming services (YouTube Premium, Netflix), software subscriptions, memberships, games, and recreational activities

categories.name: Shopping
categories.description: General shopping including electronics, gadgets, accessories, lifestyle items, online purchases, stationery, and miscellaneous non-essential items

categories.name: Debt Payments
categories.description: All loan repayments including EMIs, gold loan payments, kuri installments, and other debt obligations

categories.name: Family & Gifts
categories.description: Financial support to family members, gifts for occasions, celebration expenses, cakes for events, and contributions to family gatherings

categories.name: Professional
categories.description: Job-related expenses, professional development, online courses, certifications, job portal subscriptions, and career advancement costs

categories.name: Investments
categories.description: Money transferred to investments including mutual funds, stocks, ETFs, SIPs, gold investments, and community savings schemes

categories.name: Loans Given
categories.description: Money lent to others that you expect to get back
